sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Texas Roadhouse buys site in 2534 development
feed.summary: Texas Roadhouse has purchased a 2.326-acre site in Johnstown, Colorado for $1.925 million to build an 8,000-square-foot steakhouse. This new restaurant will be located in the 2534 master-planned community, adjacent to a future Boondocks Fun Center, and is expected to bring jobs and dining options to the area. The Town of Johnstown mayor welcomed the development, highlighting Texas Roadhouse's commitment to sustainability and community involvement.

feed.title: Gabelli Utility Trust Continues Monthly Distributions, Declares Distributions of $0.05 Per Share
feed.summary: The Gabelli Utility Trust (NYSE: GUT) announced the continuation of its fixed monthly cash distributions of $0.05 per share for July, August, and September 2024. While the Fund has a consistent history of monthly distributions since 1999, the Board of Trustees noted that the shares are currently trading at a premium to net asset value, which may not be sustainable. Approximately 99% of the 2024 distributions are expected to be a return of capital.

feed.title: GLGG Stock Fund Price and Chart — NASDAQ:GLGG
feed.summary: The GLGG fund is the Leverage Shares 2X Long GLXY Daily ETF, which aims to provide twice the daily percentage change in Galaxy Digital Inc. Class A (NASDAQ: GLXY) stock price through swap agreements and options. It is designed for short-term tactical use due to its leveraged nature, with returns potentially deviating if held for longer than a single day. The article provides key financial stats, fund composition, and technical analysis indicators for GLGG.

feed.title: Gevo (NASDAQ:GEVO) Releases Quarterly Earnings Results, Beats Expectations By $0.01 EPS
feed.summary: Gevo (NASDAQ:GEVO) announced its quarterly earnings, reporting an EPS of ($0.02), which beat analysts' estimates by $0.01, and revenue of $45.35 million, surpassing the consensus of $43.52 million. Despite beating expectations, the company remains unprofitable with a negative net margin of 37.33% and negative return on equity. The stock traded down by 1% following the announcement, and recent insider selling, including by the CFO, has been noted, while analysts maintain a "Hold" consensus rating.

feed.title: Cooper Companies (NASDAQ:COO) Issues Quarterly Earnings Results, Beats Expectations By $0.07 EPS
feed.summary: Cooper Companies (NASDAQ:COO) reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations by $0.07 EPS with $1.10 per share and meeting revenue estimates at $1.02 billion. Despite the positive earnings, the stock price experienced a slight decline. Insider purchases by the CEO and other insiders suggest confidence in the company's future performance.

feed.title: Gap’s (NYSE:GAP) Q4 CY2025 Earnings Results: Revenue In Line With Expectations But Stock Drops
feed.summary: Gap (NYSE:GAP) announced its Q4 CY2025 earnings, with revenue of $4.24 billion meeting Wall Street expectations, marking a 2.1% year-on-year increase. However, the company's Q1 CY2026 revenue guidance of $3.51 billion fell slightly below analyst estimates, leading to a 9.5% drop in stock price. Despite hitting EPS and beating EBITDA expectations, investors reacted negatively to the forward-looking revenue projections.

feed.title: RTX Announces Board Resignation and Governance Adjustment
feed.summary: RTX Corporation announced on March 5, 2026, that director James A. Winnefeld Jr. resigned from its Board of Directors, a move that did not stem from any internal dispute. Following his departure, the Board's size was reduced from eleven to ten members, representing a minor governance adjustment. Analysts currently rate RTX stock as a Buy with a $240.00 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates it as Outperform, citing improving financial performance despite valuation concerns and near-term headwinds.

feed.title: Why Grocery Outlet (GO) Shares Are Sliding Today
feed.summary: Grocery Outlet (NASDAQ:GO) shares fell sharply by 28% after the company reported disappointing fourth-quarter 2025 financial results and issued a weak forecast for 2026. Both adjusted earnings and sales missed analyst expectations, and same-store sales were flat year-on-year. The forward guidance for revenue and adjusted earnings per share significantly undershot analyst projections, leading to negative investor sentiment.

feed.title: Fertilizer Stocks To Watch Today - March 5th
feed.summary: MarketBeat has identified seven fertilizer stocks for investors to watch on March 5th, including CF Industries, Nutrien, and Mosaic. These companies are chosen for their high dollar trading volume and provide exposure to global crop demand and commodity fertilizer prices. Fertilizer stocks are inherently cyclical, influenced by factors such as weather, crop cycles, input costs like natural gas and potash, and governmental trade policies.

feed.title: ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF Options Spot-On: On March 5th, 359.64K Contracts Were Traded, With 1.54 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On March 5th, the ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF (TQQQ.US) saw active options trading, with a total volume of 359.64K contracts. Put options constituted 47.63% and call options 52.37% of these transactions. The open interest for TQQQ.US reached approximately 1.54 million contracts, which represents 108.3% of the average over the past 30 trading days.

feed.title: Fair Isaac Shareholders Approve Governance Changes and Directors
feed.summary: Fair Isaac (FICO) shareholders re-elected all eight board nominees, approved executive pay, and ratified Deloitte & Touche LLP as independent auditor at their annual meeting on March 4, 2026. They also approved amendments to the certificate of incorporation to permit officer exculpation and eliminate a supermajority voting requirement, aiming to streamline governance. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates FICO as Neutral due to strong profitability and cash generation balanced against elevated balance-sheet risk, weak technicals, and a high P/E ratio without a dividend.

feed.title: Costco Reports Q2 Double Beat, Comparable Sales Rise 7.4% On International Strength
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale Corp (NASDAQ: COST) reported a strong second quarter for fiscal 2026, surpassing analyst expectations for both revenue and earnings per share. The company saw net sales increase by 9.1% year-over-year and comparable sales rise by 7.4%, driven primarily by international strength. Despite the positive financial results, Costco's shares remained relatively flat in after-hours trading.

feed.title: Prologis to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results April 16, 2026
feed.summary: Prologis, Inc. (NYSE: PLD) announced it will host a webcast and conference call on Thursday, April 16, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. PT/12:00 p.m. ET to discuss its first quarter results, current market conditions, and future outlook. Interested parties can access the live broadcast via phone or the Investor Relations section of Prologis's website, with replays available telephonically and online.

feed.title: Aptiv Board of Directors Approves Spin-Off of Versigent
feed.summary: Aptiv PLC's Board of Directors has approved the spin-off of its Electrical Distribution Systems business into a new publicly traded company, Versigent. The record date for the distribution is March 17, 2026, with the spin-off effective April 1, 2026, where shareholders will receive one Versigent share for every three Aptiv shares. Versigent is expected to trade on the NYSE under the ticker symbol "VGNT".

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Issues Positive Forecast for Knife River (NYSE:KNF) Stock Price
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has increased its price target for Knife River (NYSE:KNF) stock from $83 to $90, maintaining a "neutral" rating and suggesting a 7.2% upside. This comes after Knife River reported an EPS beat of $0.56 against an estimated $0.41 and revenue exceeding estimates by 14.9% year-over-year. The company holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $97.43.

feed.title: Granite Ridge (NYSE: GRNT) grows 2025 output and issues 2026 production guidance
feed.summary: Granite Ridge Resources, Inc. (NYSE: GRNT) reported significant production growth in 2025, with total output increasing 28% to 31,984 Boe per day and proved reserves rising to 62,347 MBoe. Despite a Q4 net loss, the company achieved a full-year net income of $24.4 million and Adjusted EBITDAX of $315.0 million, maintaining solid liquidity with a Net Debt to Adjusted EBITDAX ratio of 1.2x. For 2026, Granite Ridge forecasts average production of 34,000–36,000 Boe per day and expects capital expenditures between $320–$360 million, reflecting a continued focus on disciplined capital allocation and controlled development through Operated Partnerships.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for Okta (NASDAQ:OKTA) Stock
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. raised its price target for Okta (NASDAQ:OKTA) to $103, maintaining an "overweight" rating and suggesting a nearly 30% upside. This follows Okta's Q4 revenue and EPS beat, though Q1 and early FY27 revenue guidance were softer, creating a mixed market reaction despite the company's focus on an "AI agents" growth narrative. The board also authorized a $1.0 billion share buyback, even as some insiders recently sold shares.

feed.title: Kimco Realty (NYSE:KIM) Given New $25.00 Price Target at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has increased its price target for Kimco Realty (NYSE:KIM) to $25.00 from $23.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating, indicating a potential upside of 6.29%. Other analysts have varying ratings, leading to a consensus "Moderate Buy" with a target of $24.23. The article also highlights significant institutional buying, with Norges Bank and several asset managers increasing their stakes, bringing institutional ownership to 89.25%.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for Target (NYSE:TGT) Stock
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has increased its price target for Target (NYSE:TGT) stock to $120.00 from $115.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating, despite potential downside from the previous close. This adjustment follows Target's strong Q4 earnings beat and a multi-year turnaround plan that includes significant investments and new store openings. While analysts acknowledge bullish catalysts, the consensus remains a "Hold" due to lingering revenue weakness and execution risks associated with the turnaround strategy.

feed.title: Philip Morris International Inc. (NYSE:PM) Announces $1.47 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Philip Morris International (NYSE:PM) has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.47 per share, payable on April 13th to stockholders of record on March 19th, representing a 3.5% yield. The company has consistently raised its dividend for 17 consecutive years, with a payout ratio of about 71%. Despite this, shares saw a 5.2% decline, and significant insider selling was reported, with the CEO and CFO selling a combined 113,800 shares.

feed.title: Is United Rentals, Inc. (URI) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
feed.summary: An article by Ricardo Pillai explores if United Rentals, Inc. (URI) is a good stock to buy, based on a bullish thesis from @MoneyShow on X.com. The thesis highlights URI's strong market position as the largest equipment rental provider, its consistent outperformance against the S&P 500, and a technical analysis suggesting a near-term trading opportunity following a recent pullback. The article also notes that while URI is held by many hedge funds, the author believes some AI stocks offer greater upside potential.

feed.title: Is Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. (APD) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
feed.summary: The article discusses a bullish thesis on Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. (APD), an industrial gas leader, suggesting it's trading at a discount despite recent stock falls. The company's management reaffirmed its 2026 adjusted EPS guidance, indicating strong growth even with ongoing helium challenges. Key projects in Louisiana and Saudi Arabia are highlighted, along with APD's attractive valuation, dividend growth streak, and strong free cash flow projections.

feed.title: Booking Holdings Stock Surges As AI-Checkout Fears Ease Thursday
feed.summary: Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) shares surged on Thursday after analyst commentary linked the stock's rise to easing fears about AI-driven disruption in online travel. This shift comes as OpenAI reportedly reduces its efforts in ChatGPT checkout, leading analysts to believe online travel agencies like Booking Holdings could rebound. Mizuho analyst Lloyd Walmsley highlighted Booking as a top pure-play OTA, suggesting a potential move towards traditional search and cost-per-click models for AI shopping, which would favor established marketplaces.

feed.title: Why Lam Research (LRCX) Stock Is Falling Today
feed.summary: Shares of Lam Research (LRCX) fell 4.5% due to concerns over potential supply chain disruptions for crucial chipmaking materials, like helium, stemming from the Middle East conflict. Adding to the decline, reports of potential new US restrictions on AI chip sales also impacted semiconductor stocks. The market's reaction, while significant, is viewed in the context of the stock's historical volatility.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (COO) CooperCompanies Reports Q1 Revenue $1.02B, vs. FactSet Est of $1.02B
feed.summary: CooperCompanies (COO) reported its Q1 revenue at $1.02 billion, matching the FactSet estimate. The company also announced a Q1 adjusted EPS of $1.10 per share, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $1.03. Following the earnings report, Cooper's shares gained after hours.

feed.title: The Mosaic Company (MOS) Declares $0.22 Quarterly Dividend; 3.3% Yield
feed.summary: The Mosaic Company (NYSE: MOS) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.22 per share, totaling $0.88 annualized, which translates to an annual yield of 3.3 percent. The dividend is scheduled for payment on June 2, 2026, to shareholders recorded by May 21, 2026, with an ex-dividend date of May 20, 2026.

feed.title: The GEO Group Announces Senior Management Changes
feed.summary: The GEO Group announced senior management changes, with Chief Financial Officer Mark Suchinski relocating and leaving his position effectively March 31, 2026. Shayn March, Executive Vice President, Finance and Treasurer, will succeed him as CFO starting April 1, 2026. Chairman George C. Zoley expressed confidence in March's 17 years of service to the company.

feed.title: Mosaic Announces Quarterly Dividend of $0.22 Per Share
feed.summary: The Mosaic Company announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.22 per share on the company's common stock. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on June 2, 2026, to stockholders of record as of May 21, 2026. The company, a leading producer of phosphate and potash crop nutrients, also stated that future dividends are subject to board approval.

feed.title: Mosaic Announces Quarterly Dividend of $0.22 Per Share
feed.summary: The Mosaic Company announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.22 per share on the Company's common stock. This dividend will be paid on June 2, 2026, to stockholders of record as of May 21, 2026. Mosaic is a leading producer and marketer of concentrated phosphate and potash crop nutrients globally.

feed.title: Gap Q4 Sales Miss Expectations After Old Navy, Athleta Fall Short
feed.summary: Gap Inc. reported fourth-quarter results that were slightly below analyst expectations, primarily due to the underperformance of its Old Navy and Athleta brands. While revenue for the period was $4.2 billion, falling short of estimates, the Gap and Banana Republic brands exceeded their comparable sales estimates.

feed.title: VICI Properties Inc. Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: VICI Properties Inc. announced its Board of Directors has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.45 per share of common stock. This dividend covers the period from January 1, 2026, to March 31, 2026, and will be payable on April 9, 2026, to stockholders of record as of March 19, 2026. The company is an S&P 500 experiential real estate investment trust with a large portfolio of gaming, hospitality, and entertainment destinations.

feed.title: Best Buy to Present at the UBS Global Consumer and Retail Conference on March 12
feed.summary: Best Buy (NYSE: BBY) announced that CEO Corie Barry and Chief Financial and Strategy Officer Matt Bilunas will participate in a Fireside Chat at the UBS Global Consumer and Retail Conference on March 12, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. A webcast of the event will be available live and after the event on the company's investor relations website. The article also includes other recent news from Best Buy, such as a quarterly cash dividend announcement and fourth-quarter results.

feed.title: American Tower to pay $1.79 a share to investors in April
feed.summary: American Tower Corporation (NYSE: AMT) announced a quarterly cash distribution of $1.79 per share on its common stock. This distribution is payable on April 28, 2026, to stockholders of record as of April 14, 2026. American Tower is a leading independent owner and operator of multitenant communications real estate, including nearly 150,000 communications sites and U.S. data center facilities.

feed.title: Own Mosaic by May 21 to receive its new $0.22 dividend
feed.summary: The Mosaic Company (NYSE: MOS) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.22 per share, payable on June 2, 2026. Shareholders must be on record by the close of business on May 21, 2026, to be eligible for this payment. However, the declaration and payment of any future dividends are subject to Board approval and are not guaranteed.

feed.title: MetLife Confirms First Quarter 2026 Series A Preferred Stock Dividend
feed.summary: MetLife has confirmed the dividend for its Series A Preferred Stock for the first quarter of 2026. This announcement provides investors with key financial information regarding their holdings in the company's preferred shares.

feed.title: The GEO Group Announces Senior Management Changes
feed.summary: The GEO Group announced that its Chief Financial Officer, Mark Suchinski, will be leaving the company effective March 31, 2026. Shayn March, Executive Vice President, Finance and Treasurer, will succeed him as CFO starting April 1, 2026. Chairman and CEO George C. Zoley expressed confidence in March's extensive experience to contribute to the company's growth and shareholder value.

feed.title: Mercury Systems, Martin Marietta Materials, Quanex, Keysight, and Fortune Brands Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Mercury Systems, Martin Marietta Materials, Quanex, Keysight, and Fortune Brands plummeted following escalating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, which caused oil prices to soar and reignited inflation concerns. The Dow Jones Industrial Average dropped significantly as the conflict in the Middle East disrupted global energy markets. The broad market sell-off affected multiple sectors, leading to sharp declines for these specific companies.

feed.title: Regeneron Announces Investor Conference Presentation
feed.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: REGN) announced that its management will participate in the Barclays 28th Annual Global Healthcare Conference on Tuesday, March 10, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET. A webcast of the session will be available on the "Investors & Media" page of Regeneron's website, with a replay and transcript archived for at least 30 days. Regeneron is a leading biotechnology company focused on developing life-transforming medicines for serious diseases.

feed.title: Gevo Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Provides Business Update
feed.summary: Gevo, Inc. announced strong financial results for Q4 and full year 2025, achieving positive cash flow from operations and a significant increase in cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash. The company reported $45 million in revenue for Q4 and $161 million for the full year, along with positive non-GAAP Adjusted EBITDA for the third consecutive quarter. Gevo also highlighted record production at its North Dakota facility, monetization of carbon credits, and progress on its Alcohol-to-Jet (ATJ) Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) project.

feed.title: Campbell’s appoints Green chief supply chain officer
feed.summary: The Campbell’s Co. has appointed Cassandra Green as its new chief supply chain officer, effective immediately. Green, who has been with the company for 16 years, will be responsible for customer logistics, planning, procurement, operational excellence, food safety, and quality. She reports to CEO and President Mick Beekhuizen and joins the operating committee, filling a position that had been vacant since November 2024.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt Announces Anticipated Dual Listing on Nasdaq Texas Stock Exchange
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. (Nasdaq: JBHT) announced its approval for a dual listing on Nasdaq Texas, LLC. This move provides J.B. Hunt with access to additional liquidity and global investors, aligning with Texas's economic growth. The company expects trading on Nasdaq Texas to begin on March 6, 2026, under the ticker “JBHT.”

feed.title: MSCI buys AI platform for LP due diligence
feed.summary: MSCI has acquired Vantager, an AI-native platform designed to enhance investment due diligence for LPs in GP data rooms. Vantager, founded in 2024, has processed thousands of private funds and over 100,000 underlying investments, supporting investors with over $100 billion in combined AUM. This acquisition aims to strengthen MSCI's private assets strategy by integrating pre-trade and post-trade management into a single, self-service client experience, addressing the time-consuming and fragmented nature of due diligence in private markets.

feed.title: Grid Dynamics (NASDAQ: GDYN) grows 2025 revenue to $411.8M
feed.summary: Grid Dynamics (NASDAQ: GDYN) reported record revenue of $411.8 million for the full year 2025, a 17.5% increase from 2024, with Q4 2025 revenue at $106.2 million. GAAP net income more than doubled to $9.7 million, while AI-related services contributed over $90 million to 2025 revenue and 25% of Q4 revenue. The company also provided a positive outlook for 2026, projecting full-year revenue between $435.0 million and $465.0 million.

feed.title: Guidewire Software Q2 Earnings Report: What Investors Need to Know
feed.summary: Guidewire Software (NYSE: GWRE) reported its Q2 earnings, beating estimated EPS by 98.31% with an EPS of $1.17 against an estimate of $0.59. The company's revenue also increased by $69.61 million compared to the same period last year. This positive earnings surprise follows previous quarters where the company consistently beat EPS estimates.

feed.title: PSEG (PEG) and Southern (SO) Upgraded, Duke Energy (DUK) Downgra
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has upgraded Public Service Enterprise Group (PEG) and Southern Company (SO) to "Outperform" with price targets of $96 and $111, respectively, citing PSEG's regulated earnings mix and favorable New Jersey regulatory environment, and Southern's robust capital plan. Conversely, Duke Energy (DUK) was downgraded to "In Line" with a $139 price target following a significant stock appreciation. PSEG's financial health shows a strong operating margin but concerns with a low current ratio and high debt-to-equity, placing it in the Altman Z-Score distress zone.

feed.title: Shopping center owner Simon secures $5.0B facility, trims borrowing costs
feed.summary: Simon Property Group (NYSE: SPG) has amended and extended its $5.0 billion multi-currency unsecured revolving credit facility, pushing its maturity out to June 30, 2030, with an option to extend to 2031. The new agreement also reduces borrowing costs for U.S. Dollar borrowings by 15 basis points to SOFR plus 65 basis points. Additionally, Simon aligned the margins of its existing $3.5 billion facility to match the new, improved pricing.

feed.title: ESS Tech (NYSE: GWH) trims 2025 losses but leans on new financings
feed.summary: ESS Tech, Inc. (NYSE: GWH) reported a net loss of $63.4 million for 2025, which is an improvement from the $86.2 million loss in 2024, alongside a 38% improvement in Adjusted EBITDA loss to $44.3 million. Despite reduced operating expenses and early-stage commercial revenue of $1.6 million, the company experienced a significant decline in working capital to $1.0 million but bolstered its liquidity through new financings, including a $40 million deal with Yorkville and a $15 million registered direct offering in early 2026. ESS Tech is focusing on strategic projects and intellectual property acquisition to scale its long-duration energy storage systems, emphasizing execution and commercial positioning in key markets.

feed.title: Equinix Closes Offering of $1.5 Billion of Senior Notes
feed.summary: Equinix, Inc. announced the closing of an underwritten offering of $1.5 billion in Senior Notes, comprising $700 million of 4.400% Senior Notes due 2031 and $800 million of 4.700% Senior Notes due 2033. These offerings, issued by wholly-owned finance subsidiaries and guaranteed by Equinix, strengthen the company's capital foundation and will be used for acquisitions, development opportunities, working capital, and refinancing existing borrowings. The company also highlighted Moody's recent upgrade of its senior unsecured rating to Baa1, reflecting confidence in its business strategy.

feed.title: PulteGroup enters Northwest Florida with deal for up to 2,653 homes
feed.summary: The St. Joe Company announced a new builder relationship with PulteGroup, the third-largest homebuilder in the U.S., marking PulteGroup's first entry into Northwest Florida. The deal involves 1,326 homesites with options for up to 2,653 total, located in two gated communities near Watersound West Bay Center in Bay County. Development of the first phase is expected to begin in 2027, highlighting the continued growth and investment in the State Road 79 corridor.

feed.title: Moody's Ratings Upgrades Equinix's Senior Unsecured Rating to Baa1 with a Stable Outlook
feed.summary: Moody's Ratings has upgraded Equinix, Inc.'s senior unsecured ratings from Baa2 to Baa1, reflecting the company's strong position in the global digital infrastructure market and continued demand for data center capacity. This upgrade is attributed to Equinix's financial discipline, consistent capital management, and increasing share of owned assets, which now account for 70% of its recurring revenue. The stable outlook underscores the expectation that Equinix's credit metrics will remain strong amidst its ongoing growth strategy.
